title: applicable_during_phase relation (ONT-R-18, D-08)
description: Flight phase scope. USE FOR: Procedure applicable_during_phase emergency; Requirement applicable_during_phase takeoff; Procedure applicable_during_phase landing; Requirement applicable_during_phase cruise. Phase enum is fixed (per CONTEXT.md Open Question #3 and D-08 — inline enum, not a separate vocabulary YAML). NOT for aircraft-model scope — that's applicable_to (ONT-R-03). NOT for cross-tier dependency on a phase-specific resource — model that with requires + applicable_during_phase on the depended-on entity. The semantic 'object' of this relation is the flight phase itself; v0.1.0 captures the phase via the required flight_phase enum field below. The base 'object' URI field (inherited from relation.base) is reserved for future use (e.g. when flight phases become first-class entities); for v0.1.0 demo data, set object to a placeholder phase-entity URI of the form aviationkb://flight-phase/<flight_phase>@1 — the flight_phase enum field is the semantic source of truth. Schema version: 0.1.0.

flight_phase.description: Per D-08 inline enum. The flight phase during which the subject (Procedure / Requirement / etc) is applicable. Required.
